caption: A person wearing a black t-shirt with a graphic and text on it, along with a lanyard around their neck, is standing indoors, likely in a classroom or presentation setting. They appear to be engaged in an activity involving a laptop placed on a table in front of them. The individual seems focused, possibly explaining or demonstrating something, as they gesture slightly with their hands while looking down at the laptop screen. The background includes a whiteboard and part of a wall, suggesting an educational or professional environment. The person's body language indicates active participation, perhaps giving a lecture or a presentation.
